title: wedelia hookeriana
intro: Wedelia hookeriana, also known as the flowering spikenard or Johnny jump-up, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Wedelia hookeriana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of Wedelia hookeriana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
